title: Which EoE Elements would you like to see in Rebuild
display_title: Which EoE Elements would you like to see in Rebuild
wikitext:
[]: Which EoE Elements would you like to see in Rebuild?             Quote Post by Kevin » Fri Apr 01, 2011 3:20 pm Everytime I watch End of Evangelion it hat a strong impact on me. So I asked myself, which parts / scenes of the Movie would I like to see in Rebuild? - Komm, süsser Tod (My favorite NGE Song) - Shinji suicide attempt - A real third Impact, or now "Fourth Impact" - The EVA Mass production series - Extremly violent action scenes mixed with the music of Bach (Its just some sick kind of Art, but still one of a kind) What I don't wanna see: - Real-Life Recordings that show some asshole sitting in a cinema and waving his hand like an idiot into the camera (Did nobody tell him, that they are making a MOVIE not a damn documentary or something like this ...) It still makes me angry everytime I see it, because for a short moment it destroys the complete atmosphere.

[]:             Quote Post by Alastor » Fri Apr 01, 2011 3:38 pm The MP Evas. /thread

[]:             Quote Post by EdmundC » Fri Apr 01, 2011 3:39 pm I'd probably like to see how they redo Instrumentality. They can leave out Shinji stimulating himself, I hope.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Fri Apr 01, 2011 3:49 pm Vaginas, vaginas everywhere

[]:             Quote Post by Kevin » Fri Apr 01, 2011 3:50 pm Xard wrote: Vaginas, vaginas everywhere

[]:             Quote Post by DanAwful » Fri Apr 01, 2011 3:53 pm Disregarding my feeling that very little of EoE will actually be relevant to the next film(s) (except in regards to the inner workings of instrumentality) I wouldn't mind seeing Gendo and Ritsuko's relationship pan out.

[]:             Quote Post by Nonoriri » Fri Apr 01, 2011 4:02 pm Mitsuo Iso key animation.

[]:             Quote Post by liquidus118 » Fri Apr 01, 2011 4:04 pm Apart from the level of quality, very little. If I wanted to watch EoE I'd watch EoE. Besides, nothing they could do could come close to EoE. We'll have waited about 15 years to see a new ending, so something different would be nice.

[]:             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Fri Apr 01, 2011 5:38 pm Surrealism, emotional subjectivity, uncompromising nature.

[]:             Quote Post by C.A.P. » Fri Apr 01, 2011 6:09 pm gatotsu911 wrote: Surrealism, emotional subjectivity, uncompromising nature.

[]:             Quote Post by evafanatic » Fri Apr 01, 2011 6:11 pm death, death and more death.

[]:             Quote Post by EdmundC » Fri Apr 01, 2011 6:14 pm C.A.P. wrote: Seconded.

[]:             Quote Post by Fallingtogrey » Fri Apr 01, 2011 6:14 pm Maybe not?

[]:             Quote Post by Shogo-Kun » Fri Apr 01, 2011 7:26 pm Fallingtogrey wrote: Arguably nothing at all. Same beginning same ending would be a waste IMO. May as well do something new with Eva.

[]: Re: Which EoE Elements would you like to see in Rebuild?             Quote Post by MasterRah » Fri Apr 01, 2011 7:48 pm Kevin wrote: Everytime I watch End of Evangelion it hat a strong impact on me. So I asked myself, which parts / scenes of the Movie would I like to see in Rebuild? - Komm, süsser Tod (My favorite NGE Song) - Shinji suicide attempt - A real third Impact, or now "Fourth Impact" - The EVA Mass production series - Extremly violent action scenes mixed with the music of Bach (Its just some sick kind of Art, but still one of a kind) What I don't wanna see: - Real-Life Recordings that show some asshole sitting in a cinema and waving his hand like an idiot into the camera (Did nobody tell him, that they are making a MOVIE not a damn documentary or something like this ...) It still makes me angry everytime I see it, because for a short moment it destroys the complete atmosphere.

[]:             Quote Post by Marduk » Fri Apr 01, 2011 9:10 pm The rumored "Operation RageQuit"

[]:             Quote Post by Castle » Fri Apr 01, 2011 9:34 pm Nonoriri wrote: Mitsuo Iso key animation.

[]:             Quote Post by Warren Peace » Fri Apr 01, 2011 9:51 pm I'm on board with throwing out EOE, pretty much. Though I do admit I'd love to see a Rebuild harpy fight.

[]:             Quote Post by Guilt & Innocence » Fri Apr 01, 2011 10:00 pm the mindfucks....

[]:             Quote Post by Warren Peace » Fri Apr 01, 2011 10:03 pm I hope you mean that figuratively, and not in an eyepatchy kinda way...
